creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: kwm
Date: Tue Dec  9 15:04:24 UTC 2014
New revision: 374400
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/374400

Log:
  Update to 2.8.14.

  This fixes a bug in the brush tool [1]
  Use new GIMP master site macro.
  Drop :keepla from USES=libtool
  Remove intltool, libartlgpl2 and gnomehier from USE_GNOME.
    Intlhack already implies intltool, gnomehier is obsolete now that pkg
    handles directories and libartlgpl2 is unused.

  PR:		194532 [1]
  Submitted by:	Kalten <kalten@gmx.at> [1]

Changes:
  head/graphics/gimp/Makefile
  head/graphics/gimp-app/Makefile
  head/graphics/gimp-app/distinfo
  head/graphics/gimp-app/files/patch-app_text_gimpfont.c
  head/graphics/gimp-app/pkg-plist
  head/graphics/py-gimp/Makefile
  head/graphics/py-gimp/pkg-plist
